scripts.check: node --check "app.js" && node --check "connection.js" && node --check "controllers/products.js" && node --check "models/products.js" && node --check "routes/index.js" && node --check "routes/products.js" && node --check "test/index.spec.js"
scripts.install:sqlite3: if [ -d node_modules/sqlite3 ]; then (cd node_modules/sqlite3 && ../../node_modules/.bin/prebuild-install -r napi || ../../node_modules/.bin/node-gyp rebuild); fi
scripts.test: bun run install:sqlite3 && PORT=8000 mocha --timeout 20000 "test/**/*.js" --reporter mocha-multi-reporters --reporter-options configFile=config.json --exit
